native_install_mechanism: Cursor project rule (.cursor/rules/*.mdc with alwaysApply: true)
install: Commit .cursor/rules/super-build-kit.mdc. alwaysApply: true loads it every session.
update: Update the rule file in the repository; Cursor re-reads it next session.
uninstall: Delete .cursor/rules/super-build-kit.mdc. Nothing outside the project is modified.
rollback: Restore the previous revision of the rule file from version control.
limitations: Rule content competes for context with other always-on rules in very large workspaces.
deprecation: None. Adapter is active and supported.
